title: Bridge Essay: Meditation-Induced Coherence and Crucial Events.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Meditation-Induced, Coherence, and, Crucial, Events..

**Meditation-Induced Coherence and Crucial Events.** — Front Physiol. PMID: 29896114. DOI: 10.3389/fphys.2018.00626. In this paper we emphasize that 1/fnoise has two different origins, one compatible with Laplace determinism and one determined by unpredictable crucial events. The dynamics of heartbeats, manifest as heart rate variability (HRV) time series, are determined by the joint action of these different memory sources with meditation turning the Laplace memory into astrongly coherent process while exerting an action on the crucial events favoring the transition from the condition of ideal 1/fnoise to
